SourceProxy.label: VESPA Delaunay 2D
SourceProxy.name: VESPADelaunay2D

Documentation.short_help: Create a 2D Delaunay triangulation from points.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter creates planar Delaunay meshes from a set of planar points. Edge and polygon constraints can be specified as vtkPolyData lines and polygons. The input mesh needs to be planar along the x, y or z axis. Constraints should not overlap each other.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Boolean Operation
SourceProxy.name: VESPABooleanOperation

Documentation.short_help: Applies boolean operations on two vtkPolyData.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter performs boolean operations between two closed polygonal meshes. These operations include union, intersection, and difference. The resulting mesh is closed.

IntVectorProperty.name: OperationType
IntVectorProperty.label: Operation Type
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Type of boolean operation.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: SHYX Point Cloud Surface SDF
SourceProxy.name: SHYXPointCloudSurfaceSDF

Documentation.short_help: Signed distance from point cloud to a surface (VTK ImplicitPolyDataDistance).

SourceProxy.Documentation: For each point in the first input (vtkPolyData point cloud), evaluates signed distance to the second input using vtkImplicitPolyDataDistance (internal clean + triangulation, vtkCellLocator, angle-weighted pseudonormals). Open surfaces are allowed. The scalar array is named SDF.

InputProperty.name: PointCloud
InputProperty.label: Point Cloud
InputProperty.Documentation: Point cloud (vtkPolyData points; optional vertex cells are preserved).

InputProperty.name: ReferenceSurface
InputProperty.label: Reference Surface
InputProperty.Documentation: Reference surface (triangulated; non-closed meshes are allowed).

SourceProxy.label: SHYX Density-Based Volume Sampler
SourceProxy.name: SHYXDensityBasedVolumeSampler

Documentation.short_help: Samples random points inside a closed mesh with density controlled by a scalar field.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter generates random sample points within the enclosed volume of a mesh. It accepts either a volume mesh (vtkUnstructuredGrid, e.g. .vtu) or a closed surface mesh (vtkPolyData). For volume meshes the outer surface is extracted automatically for the inside/outside test, and the volume cells are used for accurate scalar interpolation. The spatial density of the output point cloud is governed by a user-selected scalar array, automatically linearly mapped from its value range to 0-100%.

StringVectorProperty.name: DensityArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Density Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point-data scalar array whose values control sampling density. If left empty or the array is not found, uniform sampling is used.

IntVectorProperty.name: PreSampleCount
IntVectorProperty.label: Pre-Sample Count
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of Cartesian grid points to pre-sample. Output = interior points kept after density filtering.

IntVectorProperty.name: Seed
IntVectorProperty.label: Random Seed
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Random seed for reproducible results. Change this value to obtain a different point distribution.

SourceProxy.label: SHYX Array Probability Point Cull
SourceProxy.name: SHYXArrayProbabilityPointCull

Documentation.short_help: Subsample point cloud: keep each point with probability = clamp(scalar, 0, 1).

SourceProxy.Documentation: Each point-data scalar is interpreted as the keep probability for that point. Values outside [0, 1] are clamped; there is no rescaling by the array's min/max (e.g. data in [0.1, 0.5] gives 10%–50% keep rates). No volumetric interpolation. Input may be any vtkDataSet; coordinates use vtkDataSet::GetPoint. Output is a vertex-only vtkPolyData point cloud. Empty weight array or (Uniform) keeps all points.

StringVectorProperty.name: WeightArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Weight Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point-data scalar used as keep probability; each value is clamped to [0, 1] only. Leave empty or choose (Uniform) to keep every point.

IntVectorProperty.name: Seed
IntVectorProperty.label: Random Seed
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Seed for vtkMinimalStandardRandomSequence (reproducible subsampling).

SourceProxy.label: SHYX Bidirectional Streamline Merge
SourceProxy.name: SHYXBidirectionalStreamlineMerge

Documentation.short_help: Merge bidirectional streamlines per SeedIds; optional ids, integral, delta, random offset.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Groups VTK_LINE / VTK_POLY_LINE cells by SeedIds. For each seed with two segments (typical bidirectional trace), the first polyline in input order is kept, the second is reversed and concatenated; the shared seed vertex is merged to one point when point ids match or when the two junction points have identical coordinates (strict equality). Single-segment seeds are copied unchanged. When Generate Point Ids is on, vtkGenerateIds adds a point-data index array (0 .. N-1) using PointIdsArrayName. Optional along-line sum: cumulative 0.5*(f_i+f_{i+1}) per segment along vertex order (not multiplied by segment length). Multi-component arrays use magnitude at each vertex for that sum. Optional backward difference f_i-f_{i-1} per component along vertex order (first vertex NaN); no arc-length scaling. Optional per-streamline uniform random offset in [0, n] added to a chosen point array (same offset on that line).

StringVectorProperty.name: SeedIdsArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: SeedIds Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Cell-data (default) or point-data array used to group polylines. Same value = same seed.

IntVectorProperty.name: SeedIdsOnCells
IntVectorProperty.label: SeedIds on cells
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If on, read SeedIds from each polyline cell. If off, use the first point of each polyline (point data).

IntVectorProperty.name: GeneratePointIdArray
IntVectorProperty.label: Generate point ids
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Run vtkGenerateIds to append a point-data array of output point indices.

StringVectorProperty.name: PointIdsArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Point ids array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the point-data array created by vtkGenerateIds (0 .. numPoints-1).

IntVectorProperty.name: ComputeArcLengthIntegral
IntVectorProperty.label: Along-line integral
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, append cumulative sum along each merged polyline: each edge adds 0.5*(f_i+f_{i+1}) in vertex order (no multiplication by geometric edge length). Vectors use magnitude.

StringVectorProperty.name: IntegrandArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Integral integrand
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Input point-data array used when along-line integral and/or integrand delta is on (scalar or vector).

StringVectorProperty.name: IntegralArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Integral output name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the output point-data scalar for the cumulative integral along each merged line.

IntVectorProperty.name: ComputeIntegrandDelta
IntVectorProperty.label: Along-line integrand delta
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, append backward difference along each merged polyline: f_i-f_{i-1} at each vertex in order (same IntegrandArrayName), per component for vectors; first vertex NaN. No multiplication by edge length.

StringVectorProperty.name: DeltaArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Delta output name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the output point-data array for the along-line backward difference (same number of components as the integrand).

IntVectorProperty.name: EnablePerStreamlineRandomOffset
IntVectorProperty.label: Per-streamline random offset
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, each merged streamline draws one uniform random value in [0, RandomOffsetRangeMax] and adds it to every component of every tuple of RandomOffsetArrayName on that line only. Different streamlines use different draws.

StringVectorProperty.name: RandomOffsetArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Random offset array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point-data array to modify (must exist on input). The same random offset is added to all points of each merged streamline.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: RandomOffsetRangeMax
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Random range max (n)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Upper bound n for uniform random offsets in [0, n]. If n <= 0, the added offset is 0 on every line.

IntVectorProperty.name: RandomOffsetSeed
IntVectorProperty.label: Random offset seed
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Seed for the random number generator (reproducible when unchanged).

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Isotropic Remesher
SourceProxy.name: VESPAIsotropicRemesher
SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter remeshes a triangulated vtkPolyData using the CGAL isotropic_remesh method. Feature edges are protected.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Number Of Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of iterations for the remeshing algorithm.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ProtectAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Protection Angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Angle threshold for feature edges to protect (in degrees).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Mesh Checker
SourceProxy.name: VESPAMeshChecker

Documentation.short_help: Check a mesh for various unconformities

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter checks its input mesh is conforming to several paramters: - Watertight: the mesh is closed and bounds a volume - Intersect: the mesh does not self intersect

IntVectorProperty.name: CheckWatertight
IntVectorProperty.label: Check Watertight
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, checks the input mesh is watertight (closed and bounds a volume).

IntVectorProperty.name: CheckIntersect
IntVectorProperty.label: Check Intersect
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, checks the input mesh does not self intersect.

IntVectorProperty.name: AttemptRepair
IntVectorProperty.label: Attempt Repairing Mesh
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, tries to repair non-conformal meshes.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Mesh Deformation
SourceProxy.name: VESPAMeshDeformation

Documentation.short_help: Deforms a triangulated vtkPolyData by moving points.

SourceProxy.Documentation:
This filter deforms a surface mesh by moving control points to target positions. Neighboring points contained in a Region of Interest (ROI) may be moved to obtain a smooth deformation.
The filter can take three inputs: - the vtkPolyData mesh to deform with unique IDs for the points - a vtkPointSet with the target positions of the control points, identified by their IDs - a vtkSelection corresponding to the ROI (optional)
If a ROI is not specified, it is defined with the control points. In this case, the control points will simply be moved to their destinations without modifying the rest of the mesh.

InputProperty.name: Source
InputProperty.Documentation: Point set describing the control points and their target positions.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Selection containing the region of interest (points that can be moved).

StringVectorProperty.name: GlobalIdArray
StringVectorProperty.label: Global Point ID Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Input array describing global point IDs.

IntVectorProperty.name: Mode
IntVectorProperty.label: Deformation mode
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Deformation mode to use.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Number Of Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of iterations used in the deformation process.

IntVectorProperty.name: Tolerance
IntVectorProperty.label: Tolerance
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Tolerance of the energy convergence used in the deformation process. If 0 is specified, no energy criterion is used.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Copy attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be copied unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Mesh Subdivision
SourceProxy.name: VESPAMeshSubdivision

Documentation.short_help: Refines a triangulated vtkPolyData through subdivision.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter performs a surface mesh subdivision by creating new points to refine and smoothen a polygonal mesh. Several subdivision methods are available: - Catmull-Clark based on the PQQ pattern - Loop based on the PTQ pattern - Doo-Sabin based on the DQQ pattern - Sqrt3 based on the Sqrt3 pattern

IntVectorProperty.name: SubdivisionType
IntVectorProperty.label: Subdivision Type
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Type of subdivision.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Number Of Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of subdivisions.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Hole Filling
SourceProxy.name: VESPAHoleFilling

Documentation.short_help: Fills a selected hole in a triangulated vtkPolyData.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter fills a selected hole (or patch) in a triangulated vtkPolyData using meshing, refining and fairing. Note that if a patch is selected (even without an existing hole), the the selected triangles will be removed first.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Input that provides the selection specifying the patch or hole to fill.

IntVectorProperty.name: FairingContinuity
IntVectorProperty.label: Fairing Continuity
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Value for the tangential continuity of the resulting surface patch. Possible values are 0, 1 and 2, referring to C0, C1 and C2 continuity. Use 0 for planar filling.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Region Fairing
SourceProxy.name: VESPARegionFairing

Documentation.short_help: Fairs a region of a triangulated vtkPolyData.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter fairs (smoothes) a selected region of a triangulated vtkPolyData by moving vertices.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Input that provides the selection specifying the region to fair.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Shape Smoothing
SourceProxy.name: VESPAShapeSmoothing

Documentation.short_help: Smoothes the shape of a triangulated vtkPolyData.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter smoothes the overall shape of a triangulated vtkPolyData using the mean curvature. The degree of smoothing can be controlled using the number of iterations as well as the time step.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Number Of Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of iterations for the smoothing algorithm.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: TimeStep
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Time Step
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Time step indicating the smoothing speed. A higher value leads to a faster distortion of the shape. Standard values lie between 1e-6 and 1.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Copy attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be copied unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Poisson Surface Reconstruction Delaunay
SourceProxy.name: VESPAPoissonSurfaceReconstructionDelaunay

Documentation.short_help: Surface reconstruction of point sets with oriented normals.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This CGAL component implements a surface reconstruction method which takes as input point sets with oriented normals and computes an implicit function. The input points are assumed to contain no outliers and little noise. The output surface mesh is generated by extracting an isosurface of this function with the CGAL Surface Mesh Generator [4] or potentially with any other surface contouring algorithm.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxTriangleSize
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max Triangle Size
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum triangle size w.r.t. point set average spacing.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Surface Approximation error w.r.t. point set average spacing.

IntVectorProperty.name: GenerateSurfaceNormals
IntVectorProperty.label: Generate Surface Normals
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: (Re-)generate surface normals. If true normals will be generated and overwritten if they already exist. Otherwise, if normals exist, they will be kept.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Advancing Front Surface Reconstruction
SourceProxy.name: CGALAdvancingFrontSurfaceReconstruction

Documentation.short_help: Greedy algorithm for surface reconstruction from an unorganized point set.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter implements a surface-based Delaunay surface reconstruction algorithm that sequentially selects the triangles, that is it uses previously selected triangles to select a new triangle for advancing the front. At each advancing step the most plausible triangle is selected, and such that the triangles selected generates an orientable manifold triangulated surface.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA PCA Estimate Normals
SourceProxy.name: VESPAPCAEstimateNormals

Documentation.short_help: Estimates normals for point clouds with PCA.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter estimates the normals of a point set through PCA (either over a fixed number of neighbors or using a spherical neighborhood radius of a factor times the average spacing) and orients the normals.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfNeighbors
IntVectorProperty.label: Number of Neighbors
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of neighbors for computing the normals. .

IntVectorProperty.name: OrientNormals
IntVectorProperty.label: Orient Normals
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, normals will be oriented.

IntVectorProperty.name: DeleteUnoriented
IntVectorProperty.label: Delete unoriented normals
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, points with unoriented normals will be deleted.

SourceProxy.label: SHYX Skeleton Extraction
SourceProxy.name: SHYXSkeletonExtraction

Documentation.short_help: Extracts a curve skeleton from a closed triangle mesh.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter extracts a 1D curve skeleton from a closed triangulated surface mesh using the CGAL Mean Curvature Flow Skeletonization algorithm. The input mesh must be watertight. The output is a set of polylines representing the medial skeleton of the shape.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxTriangleAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max Triangle Angle (deg)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Local remeshing parameter. Triangles with an angle larger than this value may be split during contraction (CGAL max_triangle_angle). Unit is degrees.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MinEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Min Edge Length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Local remeshing parameter. Edges shorter than this value may be collapsed during contraction (CGAL min_edge_length). Automatic length is 0.001 times the longest side of the input axis-aligned bounding box (matches ParaView BoundsDomain scaled_extent). The property's initial value is 0 for that rule; values <= 0 use it as well. The panel shows scale and reset controls when a BoundsDomain is present.

IntVectorProperty.name: MaxIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Max Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum number of contraction iterations.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: AreaThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Area Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Area variation factor controlling convergence precision. Smaller values produce finer skeletons but take longer.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: QualitySpeedTradeoff
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Quality / Speed Tradeoff (w_H)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Controls contraction speed and approximation quality (CGAL quality_speed_tradeoff, w_H). Smaller values converge faster but may reduce skeleton quality.

IntVectorProperty.name: MediallyCentered
IntVectorProperty.label: Medially Centered
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, a medial centering step is applied to improve skeleton quality. This produces better results but takes more time.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MediallyCenteredSpeedTradeoff
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Medial Centering Tradeoff (w_M)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Controls smoothness of medial approximation (CGAL medially_centered_speed_tradeoff, w_M). Higher values move the skeleton closer to the medial axis but may slow convergence. Only used if MediallyCentered is ON.

SourceProxy.label: SHYX Vessel End Clipper
SourceProxy.name: SHYXVesselEndClipper

Documentation.short_help: Clips vessel tips flat at skeleton endpoints for CFD.

SourceProxy.Documentation:
This filter clips the tips of a vascular surface mesh at the leaf endpoints of its centerline skeleton. A cutting plane perpendicular to the local centerline tangent is placed at each degree-1 vertex, producing flat cross-sections suitable for CFD inlet/outlet boundaries.
Inputs: - Port 0 (Input): the original vessel surface mesh (vtkPolyData) - Port 1 (Centerline): the extracted centerline, e.g. from VESPA Skeleton Extraction (vtkPolyData with lines)
Outputs: - Port 0 (Clipped Mesh): the vessel mesh with tips clipped - Port 1 (Clip Planes): visualization of endpoint positions and clip plane normal directions (lines + point data)

InputProperty.name: Input
InputProperty.Documentation: The vessel surface mesh to clip.

InputProperty.name: Centerline
InputProperty.Documentation: The centerline skeleton of the vessel (e.g. output of VESPA Skeleton Extraction). Clipping planes are placed at all degree-1 (leaf) vertices.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ClipOffset
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Clip Offset
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Offset distance to shift each cutting plane along the centerline tangent. Positive values move the plane outward (away from vessel body), negative values move it inward. Default is 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: TangentDepth
IntVectorProperty.label: Tangent Depth
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of skeleton edges to walk inward from each leaf node when estimating the local tangent direction for the cutting plane. Larger values produce a smoother, more averaged tangent; smaller values follow the skeleton more locally. Default is 1.

IntVectorProperty.name: CapEndpoints
IntVectorProperty.label: Cap Endpoints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, the holes created by clipping are filled with flat caps to produce a closed (watertight) mesh suitable for CFD meshing. Requires the input vessel mesh to be closed.

StringVectorProperty.name: EndpointStatus
StringVectorProperty.label: Endpoints to Clip
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Select which endpoints to clip. Each entry corresponds to a degree-1 leaf vertex of the input centerline. Only checked endpoints will be clipped. Apply once first to discover the endpoints from the centerline input.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.
